routines.description: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
routines.newRoutineDescription: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
routines.advancedSettingsDescription: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.triggerSetupHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.
routines.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routines.emptyList: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routines.routineCreatedBody: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routines.routineCreatedDraftBody: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
routines.defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routines.failedToUpdateBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routines.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

concurrencyPolicy.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyPolicy.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencyPolicy.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catchUpPolicyDesc.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpPolicyDesc.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
